signals.headline: Iranian regime collapse by April 30 | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iranian regime collapse by April 30 | NO | HIGH confidence**

Prediction market traders price this at 99.4% probability for "No," reflecting institutional resilience despite Supreme Leader Khamenei's assassination and ongoing conflict[1]. US intelligence assessments as of mid-March confirmed government stability[1].

The search results are from April 15-17, 2026, so they may not capture developmen

Israel x Hezbollah ceasefire by April 18, 2026? | YES | HIGH confidence**

signals.headline: US and Iran pursuing second round of talks | LIKELY YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US and Iran pursuing second round of talks | LIKELY YES | MED confidence**

Sources indicate Washington and Tehran are arranging another round of discussions before the current ceasefire expires next week[2]. This has not been formally announced as confirmed but represents active diplomatic movement.

signals.headline: Mike Pence Announces He Will Not Endorse Trump or Vote for Biden in 2024 Presidential Race | NO | LOW confidence**[1]
signals.raw:
Mike Pence Announces He Will Not Endorse Trump or Vote for Biden in 2024 Presidential Race | NO | LOW confidence**[1]

Pence's statement, made Friday to Fox News after Trump clinched the Republican nomination, cites Trump's shift from conservative values like the sanctity of life as the reason he cannot endorse in good conscience; he also vows never to vote for Biden but keeps his own vote private

signals.headline: US Nearing $20B Deal with Iran to Surrender Uranium Stockpile | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Nearing $20B Deal with Iran to Surrender Uranium Stockpile | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Reports on April 17 confirm the U.S. is close to a $20 billion agreement for Iran to surrender its uranium, with weekend talks expected, driving a broad crypto rally as risk assets surge amid de-escalation.[3]
